name: boleto-expiry-fiscal-remediation
description: Post-purchase boleto-expiry fiscal remediation at the commerce meta-tool abstraction — the agent discovers an expired-unpaid boleto, communicates it collaboratively, makes the NF-e amend-vs-reissue fiscal-state judgment (correction in place vs cancel + reissue), and offers a fresh Pix. Two shared session.send() scenarios from @codespar/types/testing, driven against the runtime.
